title: Lifecycle of an Uncaught Exception in Java
description: This flowchart illustrates the path a thrown exception takes when it is not caught by any method in the call stack, ultimately leading to program termination.
relationships: Exception propagates up the call stack if uncaught
Each method in the stack has an opportunity to catch the exception
If no catch block is found, the exception reaches the JVM handler
The JVM handler prints the stack trace and terminates the program
